zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Anne Ashley於1458年出生在英國史洛普爾時，她的父親Thomas de Astley28歲，母親Editha Constable20歲。她於1484年與Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1538年1月在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾希爾莫頓享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Anne Ashley于1458年出生在英国史洛普爾时，她的父亲Thomas de Astley28岁，母亲Editha Constable20岁。她于1484年与Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1538年1月在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾希爾莫頓享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (especially in southern and central England) named Ashley, from Old English æsc ‘ash’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of French Canadian   Asselin   2.
In some cases also an Americanized form of German   Eschler  .

variants.name: Asselin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Lucien, Germain, Jacques, Normand, Amedee, Fernand, Gilles, Laurent, Alphee, Benoit.
French: from an Old French personal name, a pet form of Asse; see Ace 1. Compare Ashline .
Altered form of French   Ancelin  . Compare   Ashland   3,   Ashley   2, and   Aslin   2.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Anne Ashley was born in 1458, in Shropshire, England, her father, Thomas de Astley, was 28 and her mother, Editha Constable, was 20. She married Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee in 1484, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in January 1538, in Hillmorton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Anne Ashley est née en 1458, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Astley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Editha Constable, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee en 1484, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en janvier 1538, à Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Anne Ashley 1458 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Astley 28 und ihre Mutter Editha Constable 20. Sie hat 1484 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Januar 1538 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Hillmorton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Anne Ashley è nata il nel 1458 nel Shropshire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Astley, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Editha Constable, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee nel 1484, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel gennaio 1538, nel Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Anne Ashleyが1458年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Astleyは28歳，母Editha Constableは20歳であった。1484年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでSir Thomas Robert Morton Leeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1538年1月にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアヒルモートンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Anne Ashley(이)가 1458년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Astley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Editha Constable(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1538년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 힐모르턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Anne Ashley nasceu em 1458, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Astley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Editha Constable, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee em 1484, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em janeiro de 1538, em Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Anne Ashley родилась в 1458 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Astley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Editha Constable, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee в 1484 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла январь 1538 г. в местности хиллмортон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Anne Ashley nació en 1458, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Astley, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Editha Constable, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Robert Morton Lee en 1484, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en enero de 1538, en Hillmorton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
